task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Projects' workspace in Nuxeo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo web interface shows the current location/breadcrumb as the 'Projects' workspace.

task_completion.description: Create a new Note document within the workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A document creation form for a 'Note' is visible, or a newly created Note document is displayed in the workspace.

task_completion.description: Set the title of the Note to 'Project Readme'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title input field during creation, or the header of the saved document, explicitly reads 'Project Readme' (or 'Project-Readme').

task_completion.description: Include a brief summary in the note content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The rich text editor or the final saved note contains descriptive text summarizing the project.

task_completion.description: Create an internal hyperlink to the 'Annual Report 2023' document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The note content contains a clickable link for 'Annual Report 2023'. Evidence includes the rich text editor's link dialog searching for/selecting the 'Annual-Report-2023' document, or blue underlined text in the final note.

task_completion.description: Create an internal hyperlink to the 'Project Proposal' document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The note content contains a clickable link for 'Project Proposal'. Evidence includes the rich text editor's link dialog searching for/selecting the 'Project-Proposal' document, or blue underlined text in the final note.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Nuxeo web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard browser interaction with the Nuxeo Platform 10.10 UI (clicking buttons, filling forms) rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent created actual internal hyperlinks rather than just formatting text to look like links.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen using the hyperlink tool (chain icon) in the rich text editor and selecting the target documents from the Nuxeo repository, rather than just applying blue text color and underline formatting.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the document creation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open, and the sequence of screens shows a natural progression of document creation and saving.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task is performed in Nuxeo Platform 10.10. The target workspace is 'Projects' (path: /default-domain/workspaces/Projects). The expected note title is 'Project Readme' (or 'Project-Readme'). The note must contain internal hyperlinks to two existing File documents: 'Annual-Report-2023' and 'Project-Proposal'. Scoring breakdown: Note existence (20 points), correct title (10 points), valid link to Annual Report 2023 (35 points), valid link to Project Proposal (35 points).
